channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Everything Announced at Xbox Showcase 2026
item.content:encoded:
The summer games mess of announcements continues with the Xbox Games Showcase today with Microsoft showcasing titles from their studios, and others. It marks the first time we'll see Asha Sharmin headlining one of these events, along with Matt Booty as the head of Xbox Games Studios. They'll be debuting after Geoff Keighley took stage on Friday with a lot of reveals, and PlayStation was earlier in the week.

Note: This is a live updated recap of everything announced during the event. If an announcement isn't shown here yet, you may try refreshing and it will be there or will be soon. Additional information and trailers may be added at the end or as time permits. All of it is is in essentially chronological order.

Opening with a thanks for a great 25 years, the message then said here's to another great 25 as Xbox is celebrating its 25th anniversary this year. 

Gears of War E-Day Release Date and Xbox Exclusivity

A trailer then debuts of a Civil Emergency Message for the coalition, as Gears of War: E-Day kicks off the top of the show, just like its promised to have additional coverage after the broadcast. We see the aliens invading Earth, and wandering the streets our protagonists have guns and are trying to figure out what is going on as a modern city is being torn apart with cars tossed, creatures running about, and roads being torn up.

Cover shooting is the order of the day, as you would expect for Gears of War, and we see several different weapons before cutting ahead to someone in armor wielding a machine gun who meets our protagonists in civilians clothes. Mantling, active reload systems, and squad focus gameplay, as well as visceral melee options from bayonets and knives all appear. Gears of Wars: E-Day will release on October 6th, 2026 and will be an Xbox console exclusive - not releasing on PlayStation 5 or Nintendo Switch 2.

Fable Villain Revealed

We see Playgrounds Games up next, with their upcoming, and recently delayed Fable, with a cinematic trailer hosted by Isabel, Hero of Westmirch. We see a scattering of various things from past Fable games including the talking doors, characters reacting to things, and lots of adventuring. Isabel tells us Albion is broken, and it doesn't need 'heroes' but rather 'a hero' and that hero is her as she appears to be the villain of your journey. It will be released on my brithday February 23rd, 2027.

Halo Campaign Evolved Release Date Announced

Halo Campaign Evolved showcased more shooting action, and we got to see some of the new missions that will be released with this Halo remake. The 3 missions take place a year before the ring and showcase something different from Master Chief. Halo: Campaign Evolved releases on July 28th, 2026 and will be on PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S.

Resonance A Plague Tale Legacy Announced

A new Plague Tale was revealed by Asobo and features adventuring, exploring and lots of terrible things going on in the world. Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy release date is August 27th, 2026 on PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S.

Persona 4 Revival Announced

After a number of rumors and leaks, a remake of Persona 4 was revealed titled PErsona 4 Revival. We also got to see a Persona 4: Revival release date of February 18th, 2027 for PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S. It will be on game pass as well.

State of Decay 3 Coming Next Year

More zombie and horror action are coming with State of Decay 3 is to release in 2027 with all new features and visuals for the series.

Sea of Thieves Custom Content Coming

Are you a modder or like user generated content? Sea of Thieves is adding 'custom seas' which will allow a lot of custom modes, islands and other unique ideas. It will be available on June 18th as part of Season 20.

Metro 2039 Transits in February

Announced as proudly made in Ukraine, we see a desolete area with a lot of ruined area, and high detailed guns and dark areas as well as gas masks and explosives, that fit a certain genre of games. References to a metro, quickly identifies this is a new Metro game from 4A Games as things have continued to get worse in Metro 2039. Metro 2039 is releasing in February for PC, Xbox Series X|S and PlayStation 5.

A longtime lover of speculative fiction, in almost all its forms, Don joined TechRaptor in 2014 on a whim sending in an application as he was looking for… More about Don
